summary: Completed testing of Scheme of Work enhancements: Topics textarea, num_rows cap increase to 60, and Arabic lesson generation. All features verified working. Fixed a backend bug where max_tokens exceeded DeepSeek API limit (8192) for num_rows > 40.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/lessons/generate accepts Arabic subject (اللغة العربية)
Backend: POST /api/schemes/generate with Arabic subject returns Arabic content
Backend: Validation still requires subject field
Backend: Validation still requires class field
Frontend: Topics / Syllabus Guide textarea visible (data-testid='scheme-topics-textarea')
Frontend: Topics section has header with Lightbulb icon
Frontend: Row selector dropdown shows options [20,25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60]
Frontend: Table rows contain editable textareas (135 found)
Frontend: Textareas are editable - can fill with content
seed_data_creation: Created test user (test-user-tts) and session (test_session_tts_001) in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheme of Work enhancements verified: Topics textarea (data-testid='scheme-topics-textarea'), row selector with options [20-60], default 35 rows. Arabic lesson/scheme generation uses Arabic system prompts. Fixed max_tokens bug in server.py line 2996 - was using 16384 for num_rows>40 but DeepSeek API max is 8192.

topics_field.backend: POST /api/schemes/generate accepts 'topics' field and injects into prompts

num_rows_cap.backend: num_rows cap changed from 20 to 60 (line 2819: min(max(num_rows, 5), 60))

arabic_lesson_generation.backend: detect_language() detects Arabic subjects, system_prompt uses Arabic prompt
arabic_lesson_generation.scheme_endpoint: /api/schemes/generate uses Arabic prompts for Arabic subjects

editable_textareas.frontend: Table rows contain textarea elements (135 found)

bug_fixed.issue: DeepSeek API error: Invalid max_tokens value (16384 > 8192 limit)
bug_fixed.original_code: max_tokens = 4096 if num_rows <= 20 else (8192 if num_rows <= 40 else 16384)
bug_fixed.root_cause: DeepSeek API max_tokens limit is 8192, code was using 16384 for num_rows > 40
